entries.summary: Started frontend fix to prevent unsupported scenarios from being run through the MVP decision engine.

entries.title: Filter /decision to only show MVP decision-ready scenarios
summary: Created decision-ready-scenarios.ts with DECISION_READY_SCENARIO_SLUGS constant and isDecisionReadyScenario() helper.

Updated DecisionRunForm.tsx to filter scenario list to only the 5 MVP-ready slugs: relocation_residence, permanent_residence_citizenship, low_budget_living, business_self_employment, safety_political_risk.
Added empty state when no decision-ready scenarios are available.
Added data-testid='decision-scenario-select' to the scenario select element.
Improved decision_score_not_found error message to guide the user to MVP scenarios.
Added tests/e2e/web-mvp-decision-ready-scenarios.spec.ts with 4 tests covering filtering, locale=ru, default run, and button state.
All 38 Playwright tests pass (34 original + 4 new). TypeScript, ESLint, Next.js build, ruff, pytest (74 passed), mypy all pass.
checks_run: python -m mypy: no issues in 75 source files

entries.title: Start E2E selector hardening for 3 failing Playwright tests
summary: Started selector hardening for remaining failing Playwright MVP acceptance tests.
Fixes strict-mode violation on locale status locator and ambiguous Countries navigation link.

entries.summary: Started final Playwright selector hardening for the Decision navigation link in the main MVP flow.

entries.title: Harden Decision navigation E2E selector in main MVP flow
summary: Fixed strict mode violation in web-mvp-main-flow.spec.ts: getByRole('link', { name: 'Decision' }) matched 5 elements.
Replaced with getByRole('navigation').getByRole('link', { name: 'Decision', exact: true }) to scope to nav only.
All 34 Playwright tests pass. TypeScript, ESLint, Next.js build, ruff all pass.

entries.title: Harden MVP E2E selectors for 3 failing tests
summary: Added data-testid='locale-status' to the Translation status section in /countries/[slug]/page.tsx.
Updated web-mvp-locale.spec.ts to use getByTestId('locale-status') instead of brittle getByText(/translation status/i).
Updated web-mvp-main-flow.spec.ts to scope Countries nav click to getByRole('navigation') with exact:true.
All 34 Playwright tests pass. TypeScript, ESLint, Next.js build, ruff all pass.

entries.title: Start automated runtime acceptance layer for MVP
summary: Started automated runtime acceptance layer for frontend and backend MVP verification.
Adds Playwright E2E smoke tests covering all MVP pages, main user flow, locale, analytical pages, and data-quality.
Adds helper utilities, artifact config, package scripts, and Makefile targets.

entries.title: Add Playwright MVP runtime acceptance tests
summary: Added playwright.config.ts with Chromium, webServer (next dev), retain-on-failure artifacts to local-artifacts/.
Added tests/e2e/helpers/env.ts, assertions.ts, routes.ts helper utilities.
Added web-mvp-pages.spec.ts: 12 tests covering all 11 MVP pages + responsive smoke.
Added web-mvp-main-flow.spec.ts: full user flow home→countries→Russia→Uruguay→decision→result→country card.
Added web-mvp-locale.spec.ts: locale preservation, ru country card, ru decision, fallback banner.
Added web-mvp-analytical-pages.spec.ts: legal signals filters, sources filters, external link safety, data quality, accessibility semantics, API health.
Added data-testid attributes: decision-results, decision-run-button, country-card, legal-signals-list, sources-list, data-quality-report.
Added pnpm scripts: web:mvp:e2e, web:mvp:e2e:headed, web:mvp:e2e:report, web:mvp:check.
Added Makefile targets: web-mvp-e2e, web-mvp-check.
Added local-artifacts/ to .gitignore.
All checks pass: tsc, eslint, next build, pytest (74 passed), ruff.

entries.title: Start analytical pages UX polish and MVP regression
summary: Started analytical pages UX polish, cross-links, shared UI patterns, and MVP regression pass.
Improves /legal-signals, /sources, /internal/data-quality with summary blocks, semantic badges, URL filter support, and country cross-links.
Adds cross-links: country card ↔ legal signals, country card ↔ sources, decision result → country card.
Adds StatusBadge, SectionHeader, SummaryCard shared components.

entries.title: Polish analytical pages and MVP regression
summary: Rewrote LegalSignalsView with URL filter init from query params, summary cards, active filter chips, and country card cross-links.
Rewrote SourcesView with URL filter init, summary cards, semantic badges, external links with rel=noreferrer, and country card cross-links.
Rewrote DataQualityReportView with summary cards, checks list, issues list, status badges, and SectionHeader.
Added country card cross-links from /legal-signals and /sources back to country page.
Added DecisionResultCard country card link via locale-aware route.
Added StatusBadge, SectionHeader, SummaryCard shared components.
Added analyticalSummaryRow, summaryCard, sectionHeaderBlock, activeFilters, internalLink, externalLink, entityLinkRow, checkList, checkCard, dqStatusRow CSS classes.
All TypeScript, ESLint, and Next.js build checks pass.

entries.title: Harden frontend readiness contract and diagnostics
summary: Finalizes frontend-facing API contract readiness before minimal frontend work.
Adds or hardens runtime smoke tests, typed frontend API boundary checks, diagnostics, and generated contract verification.
Starts the machine-readable project changelog.

entries.title: Start codebase quality and security hardening pass
summary: Started codebase quality, security, duplication, decomposition, and maintainability hardening pass.

entries.title: Complete codebase quality and security hardening pass
summary: Reviewed backend routes, services, repositories, schemas, frontend typed API boundary, OpenAPI contract, tests, and tooling.
Hardened admin token verification to use constant-time comparison (secrets.compare_digest) to remove a timing side-channel.
Extended the admin token regression test to cover prefix and longer-token rejection.
Confirmed SQL access is parameterized with whitelisted sort columns and validated locales, public endpoints restrict status to published/archived, and no runtime/cache/build artifacts are tracked.
checks: python -m mypy apps packages scripts tests

entries.title: Start frontend web foundation shell
summary: Started frontend web foundation shell implementation.
Adds app shell, navigation, locale switcher, shared UI states, route placeholders, and shared config.

entries.title: Complete frontend web foundation shell
summary: Added app shell (AppShell, AppHeader, AppNavigation, LocaleSwitcher) as server and client components.
Wrapped LocaleSwitcher in Suspense in AppHeader to satisfy Next.js 15 useSearchParams boundary requirement.
Added shared config (env.ts), locale helpers (locale.ts), route constants (routes.ts).
Added shared UI states: LoadingState, EmptyState, ErrorState.
Created route placeholder pages for /decision, /sources, /internal/data-quality.
Centralized API_BASE_URL in shared/config/env.ts; removed duplicate hardcoded constants from http.ts and lib/api.ts.
Upgraded /countries page to use shared typed API client and locale from searchParams.
Rewrote layout.tsx to use AppShell and page.tsx as clean home page.
Extended styles.css with full shell, nav, locale switcher, home page, and error state styles.
Added NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL to .env.example.
checks: python -m ruff check apps packages scripts tests --fix
python -m ruff format apps packages scripts tests
python -m mypy apps packages scripts tests

entries.title: Start country card and decision flow
summary: Started first real frontend user path: countries list → country card → decision run → ranked result.
Rewrites country/[slug]/page.tsx to use the new CountryReadModelResponse read-model structure.
Adds feature components for country card display and decision run form/results.
Implements /decision as client component with POST /api/v1/decision/run and ranked result UI.

entries.title: Complete country card and decision flow
summary: Rewrote /countries/[slug]/page.tsx using CountryReadModelResponse read-model; removed all stale card.data.item usage.

Created features/country-card/ with 9 typed components: CountryHeader, CountryProfileSections, CountryScores, ScoreBreakdown, CountryLegalSignals, CountrySources, CountryEvidenceSummary, CountryUserStoriesSummary, LocaleStatusBadge.
Rewrote /decision/page.tsx as client component; created features/decision-run/ with DecisionRunForm, DecisionResults, DecisionResultCard, DecisionBreakdown, DecisionSources, DecisionWarnings.
DecisionRunForm loads countries/scenarios via API, runs POST /api/v1/decision/run, renders ranked explainable results with strengths, weaknesses, risk warnings, breakdown, and sources.
Added resolveLocale helper to shared/lib/locale.ts and shared/lib/format.ts with formatDate, formatScore, formatWeight.
Updated /countries page: added EmptyState for empty list, iso2 display, improved error typing.
Extended styles.css with all new component classes.
No backend changes required; OpenAPI contract unchanged; generated types unchanged.
checks: python -m ruff check apps packages scripts tests --fix
python -m ruff format apps packages scripts tests
python -m mypy apps packages scripts tests

entries.title: Start legal signals, sources, and data quality pages
summary: Implements /legal-signals with country/type/direction/level filters and locale support.
Implements /sources with country/source_type/confidence filters and locale support.
Implements /internal/data-quality as server-rendered admin report page.

entries.title: Complete MVP UX polish for first country card and decision flow
summary: Rewrote home page with product explanation, primary CTAs, Russia vs Uruguay block, analysis list, and source-backed trust section.
Improved /countries page with structured country preview cards, primary/secondary action links, locale preserved.
Improved /countries/[slug] page: added breadcrumbs, fallback banner, executive summary section at top, quick action links on CountryHeader, reordered sections.
Improved /decision page with explanation text; DecisionResults now shows winner/top-ranked block prominently.
Added semantic badge components: Badge, ImpactBadge (direction + level), ConfidenceBadge.
Added Skeleton component for loading states.
Added loading.tsx files for /countries, /countries/[slug], /decision.
Improved EmptyState (message prop), ErrorState (backend-down detection, back link), LoadingState (message + animated dots).
Updated CountryScores to show collapsible breakdown, CountryLegalSignals and CountrySources to use semantic badges.
Updated DecisionResultCard: strengths/weaknesses/risks visually distinct via background color sections.
Updated DecisionWarnings to use ImpactLevelBadge.
Extended styles.css with badge, skeleton, loading, fallback banner, breadcrumbs, quick actions, home sections, country cards, decision winner block styles.
No backend changes. OpenAPI unchanged. Generated types unchanged.
checks: python -m mypy apps packages scripts tests

entries.title: Start MVP UX polish for first country card and decision flow
summary: Started MVP UX polish for the first country card and decision flow.

Improves home page to explain the product, adds country cards with action links, adds breadcrumbs and quick actions on country pages, adds winner highlight to decision results, hardens loading/error/empty states, adds impact/confidence badges.

entries.title: Complete legal signals, sources, and data quality pages
summary: Created features/legal-signals/LegalSignalsView.tsx: client component with Suspense boundary, filter state (country/signal_type/impact_direction/impact_level), locale-aware API calls via legalSignalsApi, loading/error/empty states, signal cards with all fields.

Created features/sources/SourcesView.tsx: client component with Suspense boundary, filter state (country/source_type/confidence), sourcesApi calls, loading/error/empty states, source cards with external link, publisher, dates.

Created features/data-quality/DataQualityReportView.tsx: pure presentational server component rendering DataQualityReport summary (overall_status, critical_issues_count, warnings_count, checked_at) and issues list with per-severity left-border styling.
Rewrote app/legal-signals/page.tsx: server shell rendering LegalSignalsView; removed stale apiGet usage and local type definition.
Rewrote app/sources/page.tsx: server shell rendering SourcesView; replaced placeholder.

Rewrote app/internal/data-quality/page.tsx: async server component reading process.env.ADMIN_TOKEN (never NEXT_PUBLIC_), calling dataQualityApi.getDataQualityReport, rendering DataQualityReportView or ErrorState.
Extended styles.css with filterPageWrap, filterBar, filterGroup, filterLabel, filterSelect, clearButton, signalCard, sourceCard, sourceLink, dqWrap, dqSummaryCard, dqIssueCard, dqSeverity-* classes.
Admin token read server-side only via process.env.ADMIN_TOKEN; no secrets exposed to client.
checks: python -m mypy apps packages scripts tests
